description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Template for Custom Board Build that accepts a string input 'args'. The workflow runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, installs Python 3.11, and performs a series of steps to build and test custom board projects using PlatformIO, including pre-building, copying custom board JSON files, building FastLED examples, running CPP checks, and uploading build artifacts and logs on failure.
